case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA vs. NATIONAL AUTO & CAS. INS. CO et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTO & CAS. INS. CO DAD'S BAIL BONDS

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NATIONAL AUTO & CAS. INS. CO DAD'S BAIL BONDS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,080.00
